title: Unusual SIEM Event Sequence
description:
A SIEM alert highlights an unusual change in security-event behavior on a production server.

Download the investigation pack, correlate SIEM alert streams/timelines with host auditd telemetry, auth-log size drift, privileged command/session data, and rule-engine metrics, then determine which CIA pillar was primarily impacted.

Flag Format
CTF{pillar}
